
    Read .gitignore

  Repo contents: one file.

  ────────────────────────────────────────

  .gitignore

  Git ignore rules for a Murder agent harness (or a project that uses it). It excludes Murder's
  local state under .agents/ (SQLite DB murder.db plus WAL/SHM, a lock file, and runs/),
  secret-bearing .env files (including .agents/.env), and the .murder/ directory.

  ────────────────────────────────────────

  Bottom line: testingmurderharness is effectively a stub — only a Murder-oriented .gitignore,
  no source, tests, or config yet.


  Search the entire repo recursively. For every file found, read it fully and write a detailed
  200-word summary.


  $ find /home/user/Documents/code/testingmurderharness -type f 201ms
    /home/user/Documents/code/testingmurderharness/.gitignore
    ---
    … truncated (2 more lines) · ctrl+o to expand

    Globbing "**/*" in .
